testcase.name: layeredArchitectureRule

failure.message: Architecture Violation [Priority: MEDIUM] - Rule 'Layered architecture considering all dependencies, consisting of layer 'Controller' ('..controller..') layer 'Service' ('..service..') layer 'Repository' ('..repository..') where layer 'Controller' may only access layers ['Service'] where layer 'Service' may only access layers ['Repository']' was violated (38 times): extends class <java.lang.Object> in (UserServiceTest.java:0) Class <com.luisalonso.userservice.service.UserServiceTest> has annotation member of type
